title: Adventure Panorama
description: A new look for Minecraft's menu
body:
![A title card reading "Adventure Panorama"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea0adf6de0f028a3f95d5d64bf1a0987ce740405.png)
![The panorama featuring a table with different minecraft items scattered on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93de59ba88557e764d105bc24f65b932f9541f20_0.webp)
# About
- 📃 This resource pack changes the Minecraft menu to a table top view inspired by Sea of Theives' menu.
- ✏️ No mods required. Works with a 100% vanilla instance.
- 🖼️ The artwork is mine (created in Blender 3D)
- 🔎 Have suggustions, requests, or issues? Use the issue tracker linked on the right.
_________________________________________________________________________________________
**Looking for a more vanilla friendly version? Check out the Vanilla Shading edition!**
[![The link to the vanilla shading version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b492c68776ead37a09f5a2cf70a951a7333fa9.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/EOQTELA5)
